region_definitions.source_region: cylindrical region around source container interior; center_xy=(0.0, 0.0) radius=0.055 z=[0.0, 0.13]
region_definitions.spill_region: finite particles outside source and target regions with z >= table_z
region_definitions.target_region: cylindrical region around target container interior; center_xy=(0.22, 0.0) radius=0.055 z=[0.0, 0.13]

variant.description: Closed analytic cylinder negative control; never promoted to S3.
variant.name: custom_cylinder_analytic_negative_control
